name: EuiBadge
description: Colored label for status, category, or count. Supports click handlers.

iconType.description: Accepts any string from our icon library

iconSide.description: The side of the badge the icon should sit

color.description: Accepts either our palette colors (primary, success ..etc) or a hex value `#FFFFFF`, `#000`.

fill.description:
Whether the badge should use filled (more intense) colors.
It has no effect when a non-named color is passed to the `color` prop.

isDisabled.description: Will override any color passed through the `color` prop.

closeButtonProps.description: Props passed to the close button.

aria-label.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

iconOnClick.description: Will apply an onclick to icon within the badge

iconOnClickAriaLabel.description: Aria label applied to the iconOnClick button

onClick.description: Will apply an onclick to the badge itself

onClickAriaLabel.description: Aria label applied to the onClick button
